---
title: "Ray Wang"
pagetitle: "Ray Wang"
subtitle: "DATA SCIENTIST AT WALLICK COMMUNITIES"

about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 28em
  id: hero-heading
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      aria-label: "LinkedIn"
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/   # TODO: replace with your LinkedIn URL
    - icon: github
      aria-label: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/        # TODO: replace with your GitHub URL
    - text: "{{< fa envelope >}}"
      aria-label: Email
      href: mailto:you@example.com     # TODO: replace with your email
page-layout: full

execute:
  freeze: false
  echo: false
  warning: false

header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/index.css">
resources:
  - assets/index.css
---

<br><br>


::: {#hero-heading}

I'm a data scientist working at **Wallick Communities**, where I turn operational data into reports and insights that help the business run better. Outside of work I'm on a continuous learning journey through Python, statistics, and modern data tooling — and this site is where I share what I'm working on and what I've learned along the way.

[Learn more about me &rarr;](/about){.about-links .subtitle}

:::
<!-- hero-heading -->
